title: General view of a UN Security Council meeting at United Nations headquarters in New York on January 15, 2026. (AFP)

snapshot.title: Denmark and Pakistan push for end to impunity for violence against UN peacekeepers
snapshot.description: NEW YORK CITY: Denmark and Pakistan have tabled a UN Security Council resolution calling for an end to the near-total impunity that perpetrators of attacks against UN peacekeepers have long enjoyed. It is expected to be put to a vote imminently. The draft resolution, seen by Arab News, is framed as a direct challenge to what the council itself acknowledges has become a culture
snapshot.author: Ephrem Kossaify
snapshot.pageTitle: Denmark and Pakistan push for end to impunity for violence against UN peacekeepers | Arab News
